title: Iran VP Aref statement
snippet: Iranian First Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref said his country will no longer allow "enemy" military equipment to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. This escalates rhetoric beyond commercial tolls to outright military equipment ban.
tag_reason: 5/17 신규 — 이란 부통령의 호르무즈 '적국 군장비 통과 불허' 공식 선언
